scripts.build: bun run fix:imports && bun run lint && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && bun build ./src/content-script.ts --outfile ./dist/content-script.js --target browser && bun build ./src/popup-script.ts --outfile ./dist/popup-script.js --target browser && cp manifest.json dist/manifest.json && cp popup.html dist/popup.html && cp -R assets dist/assets
